title: Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Margin Expansion
text: Twist Bioscience achieved record quarterly performance with revenue reaching $84.7 million in Q4 2024, representing a 27% year-over-year increase. For the full fiscal year 2024, total revenue hit $313 million, up 28% from the prior year. The company demonstrated significant margin expansion, achieving 45.1% gross margin in Q4 and 42.6% for the full year—a substantial improvement from 36.6% in fiscal 2023. The Synthetic Biology (SynBio) segment generated $33.9 million in Q4 revenue (28% YoY growth), while Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) contributed $45.5 million (23% YoY growth). The company reported an adjusted EBITDA loss of approximately $17 million for Q4. Fiscal 2024 saw significant improvement with an adjusted EBITDA loss of $93.5 million—approximately $54 million better than the prior year. The company maintains a strong cash position of $276.4 million as of September 30, 2024. Management highlighted competitive advantages including domestic US manufacturing and minimal exposure to NIH budgets, with fewer than 1% of revenues dependent on federal research funding.
